name: Name
greeting: Dear Students, Faculty, Staff, and Esteemed Partners
speech:
As we embark on the age of Artificial Intelligence, Milestone College strives to empower learners to work alongside intelligent machines, think critically beyond algorithms, and shape a future where technology calibrates humanity rather than defines it. Standing at the helm of all affairs, I feel a strong sense of responsibility to prepare the learners for a rapidly evolving, interconnected world, while remaining committed to accessible, flexible, and affordable education.
 
 As we embark on the age of Artificial Intelligence, Milestone College strives to empower learners to work alongside intelligent machines, think critically beyond algorithms, and shape a future where technology calibrates humanity rather than defines it. Standing at the helm of all affairs, I feel a strong sense of responsibility to prepare the learners for a rapidly evolving, interconnected world, while remaining committed to accessible, flexible, and affordable education.
